mapper.select: select user.user_id, user.user_name, user.user_password, user.user_mail, user.user_enable, role.role_name from schema_authority.user, schema_authority.role, schema_authority.user_role where user.user_name = #{userName} and user.user_id = user_role.ur_user_id and user_role.ur_role_id = role.role_id
mapper.insert: insert into schema_authority.user(user.user_name, user.user_password, user.user_mail, user.user_enable) values (#{userName},#{userPassword},#{userMail},#{userEnable})
